query:
INSERT INTO
            witness_inputs_fri (
                l1_batch_number,
                chain_id,
                priority,
                witness_inputs_blob_url,
                protocol_version,
                status,
                created_at,
                updated_at,
                protocol_version_patch,
                batch_sealed_at
            )
            VALUES
            ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, 'queued', NOW(), NOW(), $6, $7)
            ON CONFLICT (l1_batch_number, chain_id) DO UPDATE
            SET
                updated_at = NOW()
